import React from 'react'; import { Nav, NavbarContainer, NavLogo, MobileIcon, NavMenu, NavItem, NavLinks } from './NavbarElements'; import {FaBars} from 'react-icons/fa'; import Logo from '../../assets/imgs/nct_logo_white.svg'; const Navbar = ( { toggle } ) => { return ( <>
Home Recent Work About
) } export default Navbar;
